prose: The Fukui-reaction susceptibility analysis was performed on phenol using DFT with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set under the standard tier in a gas phase environment. The calculation identified most electrophilic and nucleophilic sites, with the relevant surfaces and charges computed. The method used was B3LYP/def2-TZVP at the standard tier in a gas-phase environment. The calculation converged with some warnings related to charge conservation drift, but no errors were reported.
